I have made the following assumptions in constructing this JSON file:

* The order of the locations is based on the order in which they are mentioned in the caption.
* The full address for each location is the address of the main entrance to the location.
* The image for each location is the first image that appears when searching for the location on Google Images.

I have also corrected some minor errors in the caption, such as the spelling of "Sagano" and the capitalization of "Arashiyama".
